zh.lifeSummary: 當John Adams於1510年出生在英國賀特福爾比曉普也斯 斯托特福德時，他的父親John Adams59歲，母親Jane Rannelegh56歲。他和Elizabeth Adams至少有7個兒子和5個女兒。他去世於1578年5月28日在英國英格蘭賀特福爾薩布利其沃斯享年68歲，埋葬在英國賀特福爾薩布利其沃斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Adams于1510年出生在英国賀特福爾比曉普也斯 斯托特福德时，他的父亲John Adams59岁，母亲Jane Rannelegh56岁。他和Elizabeth Adams至少有7个儿子和5个女儿。他去世于1578年5月28日在英国英格兰賀特福爾薩布利其沃斯享年68岁，埋葬在英国賀特福爾薩布利其沃斯。

nameMeanings.name: Adams
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Dutch, and German (mainly northwestern Germany): patronymic from the personal name Adam . In North America, this surname has absorbed cognates from other languages, e.g. Greek Adamopoulos , Serbian and Croatian Adamović (see Adamovich ), Polish (and Jewish) Adamski .
Irish and Scottish: adopted for McAdam or a Scottish variant of Adam , with excrescent -s.

History: This surname was borne by two early presidents of the US, father and son. They were descended from Henry Adams, who settled in Braintree, MA, in 1635/6, from Barton St. David, Somerset, England. The younger of them, John Quincy Adams (1767–1848) derived his middle name from his maternal grandmother's surname (see   Quincy  ). — Another important New England family, established mainly in NH, is descended from William Adams, who emigrated from Shropshire, England, to Dedham, MA, in 1628. James Hopkins Adams (1812–61), governor of SC, was unconnected with either of these families, his ancestry being Welsh; his forebears entered North America through PA.

variants.name: Adam
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Vito, Angelo, Antonio, Salvatore, Giuseppe, Santo, Giovanna, Nicola, Aldo, Baldassare, Carmelo, Carmino.
Italian: from the personal name Adamo, the Italian form of Adam .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When John Adams was born in 1510, in Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, England, his father, John Adams, was 59 and his mother, Jane Rannelegh, was 56. He had at least 7 sons and 5 daughters with Elizabeth Adams. He died on 28 May 1578, in Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 68, and was buried in Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Adams est né en 1510, à Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, son père, John Adams, avait 59 ans et sa mère, Jane Rannelegh, avait 56 ans. Il a eu au moins 7 fils et 5 filles avec Elizabeth Adams. Il est décédé le 28 mai 1578, à Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 68 ans, et a été enterré à Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Adams 1510 in Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Adams 59 und seine Mutter Jane Rannelegh 56. Er hatte mit Elizabeth Adams mindestens 7 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 28. Mai 1578 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Adams è nato il nel 1510 nel Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, England, il suo padre, John Adams, aveva 59 anni e il suo madre, Jane Rannelegh, aveva 56 anni. Lui avuto almeno 7 figli e 5 figlie con Elizabeth Adams. Morì il 28 maggio 1578, nel Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 68 anni, e fu sepolto a Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: John Adamsが1510年にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアビショプ'ス ストルトフォードで生まれた時，父John Adamsは59歳，母Jane Ranneleghは56歳であった。彼はElizabeth Adamsとの間に少なくとも7人の息子と5人の娘をもうけた。彼は1578年5月28日にイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアサウブリジェウオルスで68歳で死去し，イギリスハートフォードシュアイアサウブリジェウオルスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Adams(이)가 1510년 영국 허트퍼드실르 비숍'스 스토르트퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Adams(은)는 59세였고, 그의 어머니 Jane Rannelegh(은)는 56세였다. 그는 Elizabeth Adams(와)과 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1578년 5월 28일 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 사w브리지워스에서 68세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 허트퍼드실르 사w브리지워스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Adams nasceu em 1510, em Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Adams, tinha 59 anos e sua mãe, Jane Rannelegh, tinha 56 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 7 filhos e 5 filhas com Elizabeth Adams. Ele faleceu em 28 de maio de 1578, em Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 68 anos, e foi sepultado em Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Adams родился в 1510 г. в местности бишоп'с стортфорд, хиртфордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Adams было 59 лет, а матери, которую звали Jane Rannelegh, 56. У него было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 5 дочерей от Elizabeth Adams. Он умер 28 мая 1578 г. в местности савбриджюорт, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 68 лет и был похоронен в местности савбриджюорт, хиртфордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Adams nació en 1510, en Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Adams, tenía 59 años y su mamá, Jane Rannelegh, tenía 56 años. Tuvo por lo menos 7 hijos y 5 hijas con Elizabeth Adams. Murió el 28 de mayo de 1578, en Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 68 años, y fue sepultado en Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra.
